memory:memory/2026-04-29.md:67:96.snippet: **Root Cause:** Line ~1104 in gmgn_scanner.py uses `data.get('token_data', {}).get('creation_timestamp', 0)` which is the STORED value from when token was first added to COOLDOWN_WATCH — not fresh GMGN data. If GMGN `created_timestamp` = 0 or missing, `creation_timestamp` defaults to 0 → `now - 0 = huge number` → age appears correct → BUY PASSES. **Fix needed:** Use GMGN `created_timestamp` from fresh_data at PUMP_VERIFY. If unavailable or < PUMP_MIN_AGE, reject the buy. ### Bug #2: sell_token Dedup Blocks Same-Token Different-TP Sells TP3 sell was blocked 30s after TP2 sell because dedup logic checked "same token + <60s = skip ALL". **Fix applied:** Only skip if same token + same reason
